style: Hand-painted stylized Warcraft mobile-game art (Clash-Royale-meets-Warcraft), cohesive painterly rendering with crisp clean edges, slightly heroic-chunky proportions, vibrant but readable colors, soft cinematic dusk lighting with a warm rim light, 4k, highly detailed.

assets.prompt: A single Stormwind-style Alliance stone watchtower keep, pale blue-grey stone with a tall blue conical roof, gold trim, banners with the gold lion crest, glowing arcane-blue brazier, weathered and heroic, three-quarter view, isolated full structure cutout, no ground, no scenery, vertical.

A single Orgrimmar-style Horde watchtower, dark timber and black iron lashed with rope, bone palisade spikes and tusks, red banners with the black Horde emblem, a skull totem, glowing ember brazier, brutal and menacing, three-quarter view, isolated full structure cutout, no ground, no scenery, vertical.

Seamless tileable top-down game ground texture, lush green Azeroth grassland with patches of mossy stone and trampled dirt paths, faint blue Alliance lion heraldry worn into the earth, flat even overhead lighting, no shadows, no characters, no horizon, low contrast so heroes read clearly on top, seamless repeating pattern.

Seamless tileable top-down game ground texture, scorched cracked red-brown Durotar wasteland, dry dirt with charred ash, faint glowing ember cracks, scattered bone fragments, flat even overhead lighting, no shadows, no characters, no horizon, low contrast so heroes read clearly on top, seamless repeating pattern.

Epic panoramic Azeroth battlefield vista at war-dusk, distant Alliance castle spires on the left and a jagged Horde fortress with red banners on the right, storm clouds with fiery amber and violet sky, smoke and drifting embers, atmospheric depth, no foreground characters, wide cinematic landscape.
